title: Professional Halal Consulting & Certification Services
description: Comprehensive solutions designed to help businesses achieve Indonesian Halal compliance and expand confidently into global Muslim markets.

service-1.title: Indonesian Halal Certification
service-1.description: Professional consulting and compliance support for businesses pursuing Indonesian Halal certification.

service-2.title: Ingredient & Supply Chain Verification
service-2.description: Ensuring transparency and traceability across ingredients, suppliers, and production materials.

service-3.title: Factory Audit Preparation
service-3.description: Helping factories establish operational readiness for Halal certification audits and inspections.

service-4.title: Documentation & Certification Support
service-4.description: Administrative and technical assistance throughout the certification process.

service-5.title: Halal Training Programs
service-5.description: Training programs designed to build sustainable long-term Halal compliance systems.
